name: Ariel & Zoey & Eli, Too
overview: Welcome to Ariel and Zoey and Eli, Too, where three sibling-musicians write and perform songs, and interview accomplished artists. In 2015, the trio were nominated for a Daytime Emmy award in the category of Outstanding Original Song.

trailers.title: Ariel & Zoey & Eli, Too - Television Show Trailer - Season One
